scripts.build-all: pnpm --filter @gen-epix/tools-lib run build && pnpm --filter @gen-epix/generate-license-manifest run build && pnpm --filter @gen-epix/oidc-mock-server run build && pnpm --filter @gen-epix/generate-api run build && pnpm --filter @gen-epix/generate-demo-upload-data run build && pnpm --filter @gen-epix/translation-util run build
scripts.validate-all: pnpm run lint && pnpm run check-types
